summary: Tested homepage flickering issue in RecommendedProducts component. NO FLICKERING DETECTED during extensive testing. All 3 recommendation sections (رائج الآن، عروض وخصومات، منتجات جديدة) remain stable during initial load, scrolling, and page reloads. Backend APIs are working correctly and returning data consistently. The previously reported issue appears to be RESOLVED.
critical_code_review_comments: RecommendedProducts.js code structure is correct - uses single 'loaded' state with Promise.all for batch fetching
Previous 'loadingTrending is not defined' error was likely hot reload cache issue - now resolved
SmallBadge component has its own useEffect which could theoretically cause minor re-renders, but no visible flickering observed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Flickering issue appears resolved. RecommendedProducts component uses: 1) Single 'loaded' state 2) Promise.all for concurrent API calls 3) Skeleton loading while data loads 4) Framer-motion for smooth animations. All three sections display correctly: Trending (purple), Deals (green), New Products (cyan).

flickering_monitoring.description: Monitored sections for 10+ seconds across multiple page loads, scrolls, and reloads

data_consistency.description: Data returned consistently across multiple API requests

scroll_behavior.description: Sections remain visible and stable during scrolling

page_reload.description: Sections load correctly after page refresh

console_errors.description: No JavaScript errors detected in console

flickering_analysis.conclusion: The flickering issue reported by the user was NOT reproducible during testing
possible_causes_considered: Multiple loading states causing re-renders - RULED OUT (single 'loaded' state used)
useEffect running multiple times - RULED OUT (empty dependency array)
Hot reload cache issue with 'loadingTrending' variable - LIKELY CAUSE of previous error, now resolved
Framer-motion animations - Present but not causing flickering
flickering_analysis.code_improvements_made: Main agent already implemented Promise.all batched loading and single 'loaded' state

api_tests_summary.deals_products: PASSED - Returns products with discount info

final_verdict: ✅ Flickering issue NOT REPRODUCIBLE - appears resolved. All sections load and display correctly.
